releaseNotes.releaseNotesTooltip:
What's new in RTX Kit 2026.2:
  • RTXDI: Updated to v3.0 (Added ReSTIR PT algorithm)
  • RTX Neural Shaders SDK: Updated to v1.3.1 (API improvements and Linux documentation)
  • RTX Character Rendering SDK: Updated to v1.3 (Expanded Geometry library with curve tessellation API, NRD denoising improvements)
  • RTX Path Tracing: Updated to v1.8.1 (Significant performance improvements and public DXR 1.2 support for OMM and SER APIs)
  • RTXGI: Updated to v2.7 (addition of DLSS-RR in sample, SHaRC improvements, various quality of life improvements)
  • Streamline: Updated to v2.10.3 (Bug Fixes & Stability Improvements)
  • NRD: Updated to v4.17.1 (Various bug fixes and improvements)
Open Release Notes

What's new in RTX Kit 2026.1:
  • RTX Neural Texture Compression SDK:Updated to v0.9.1 beta (Performance optimizations)
  • RTX Neural Shaders SDK: Updated to v1.3 (Added visualization graphs to shading Training examples)
  • RTX Character Rendering SDK: Updated to v1.2 (Added Vulkan support for RTX Hair)
  • RTX Path Tracing: Updated to v1.7 (New Stress test scene and performance optimizations)
  • RTXGI: Updated to v2.6 (SHaRC improvements, general bug fixes)
  • RTXMG: Updated to v1.0.1 (Added vertex normal support and general bug fixes)
  • Streamline: Updated to v2.10.0 (Bug Fixes & Stability Improvements)
  • NRD: Updated to v4.16.1 (Various bug fixes and improvements)
  • OMM: Updated to v1.9.1 (Added GPU baking tests and general bug fixes)
Open Release Notes

What's new in RTX Kit 2025.4:
  • RTX Neural Texture Compression SDK: adds a D3D12 path for Cooperative Vectors, which provides evaluation, texture compression, and engine integration tools alongside a library for decompression
  • RTX Neural Shaders SDK: Introduces a new sample for converting from SlangPy (a library designed to make calling GPU code written in Slang easy) to C++. Slang is used to train and deploy tiny neural networks for shaders.
  • RTX Character Rendering SDK: Adds animation support to the digital human sample, making it easier to review RTX Hair and Skin implementations.
  • RTX Texture Filtering SDK: Brings new optimizations that improve the quality of filtered textures when magnified.
  • RTX Global Illumination SDK: Received bug fixes and user experience updates.
Open Release Notes
